summary: Comprehensive testing of NovaClaw AI Butler app - all backend APIs (24/24 tests passed) and frontend UI flows working correctly. Auth, conversations, messages with SSE streaming, skills, and settings all functional.
critical_code_review_comments: CORS is set to allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=False - acceptable for this use case but consider restricting origins in production
Brute force protection implemented correctly with 5 attempts and 15-minute lockout
JWT tokens properly implemented with access (2hr) and refresh (7 days) tokens
Ollama fallback to Emergent LLM key working correctly when Ollama unavailable

test_users_created: Various TEST_ prefixed test data in conversations

seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded on startup with idempotent password update
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: Auth (login/register/logout/refresh), Conversations (CRUD), Messages (SSE streaming with Emergent LLM fallback), Skills (list/toggle), Settings (get/update). Mobile responsive view working. Voice mode button visible (browser Web Speech API dependent). Portuguese BR interface throughout.

auth.me: PASS - returns user info with valid token

messages.send_with_sse: PASS - SSE streaming working with Emergent LLM fallback

settings.get: PASS - Ollama URL, model, TTS settings

frontend_ui.login_page: PASS - NovaClaw branding, form elements, Portuguese labels
frontend_ui.registration: PASS - toggle to register mode, name field appears
frontend_ui.chat_page: PASS - sidebar, message input, voice button, send button
frontend_ui.new_conversation: PASS - Nova Conversa button creates conversation
frontend_ui.send_message: PASS - message sent, AI response received with streaming
frontend_ui.conversation_sidebar: PASS - shows history, rename/delete on hover
frontend_ui.settings_panel: PASS - Ollama URL/model inputs, TTS toggle, save button
frontend_ui.mobile_responsive: PASS - mobile menu button, sidebar overlay

notes.ollama_status: Ollama not available in this environment - app correctly falls back to Emergent LLM key (gpt-4o-mini)
notes.voice_mode: Voice button visible, actual speech recognition depends on browser Web Speech API support
notes.pwa: App configured as PWA with manifest.json
